summary: Schema.Literal("file", "directory") should be Schema.Literals(["file", "directory"]) in claims group schema — causes cascade type errors
details: Schema.Literal takes exactly 1 argument in Effect v4. For multiple literal values, use Schema.Literals(array). This bug on lines 68 and 75 causes the schema to infer type as just "file", which then cascades into type errors in handlers/claims.ts
